_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: We observed that 844 to 848 mutants are highly ubiquitylated compared to wild-type neurofibromin
details: Detected high levels of ubiquitination on 844-848 mutants compared to wild-type neurofibromin in immunoprecipitation experiments
